title: Small details you noticed in 3010
wikitext:
[]: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by FryMeTuhDehMuhn » Fri Aug 27, 2021 7:37 am One that I found that I haven't seen mentioned anywhere is that you can see Asuka Soryu's monkey doll in key ring form on Asuka Shikinami's backpack: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by The Dragon Mask » Fri Aug 27, 2021 11:51 am Don't have a picture of it, but one of the pieces of equipment they retrieve from Euro Nerv is marked as "JA-02", aka Jet Alone 2, and it looks pretty similar to it. I then noticed that that must be the bulk of Unit 02's new body in the final battle, since it has a similar silhouette. So Jet Alone finally contributed, though only by being a fat battery and missile silo for Unit 02 haha.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Aug 27, 2021 2:42 pm The signs behind Shinji and Mari in Ube Train Station that say "ATS OK?" I assume that's a railway thing and not an AT Field thing.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 27, 2021 3:05 pm The Dragon Mask wrote: Don't have a picture of it, but one of the pieces of equipment they retrieve from Euro Nerv is marked as "JA-02", aka Jet Alone 2, and it looks pretty similar to it.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 27, 2021 3:37 pm Jayfive wrote: The signs behind Shinji and Mari in Ube Train Station that say "ATS OK?"

Thank you in advance! Note, my native language is Portuguese. You can use your mother tongue to talk to someone else who spoken your same language only in private messages (PM).

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sat Aug 28, 2021 10:46 am I found a thread on Twitter, with some interesting observations regarding the spear of Gaius: https://twitter.com/cccccc6512/status/1 ... 8194545670

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by The Dragon Mask » Sat Aug 28, 2021 1:33 pm Raikyu wrote: I found a thread on Twitter, with some interesting observations regarding the spear of Gaius: https://twitter.com/cccccc6512/status/1 ... 8194545670

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Aug 28, 2021 3:07 pm The ground zero of 2nd impact is divided into multiple layers: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Aug 29, 2021 1:49 am Raikyu wrote: I found a thread on Twitter, with some interesting observations regarding the spear of Gaius: https://twitter.com/cccccc6512/status/1 ... 8194545670

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by The Dragon Mask » Sun Aug 29, 2021 4:15 am gatotsu911 wrote: I really, really want someone to tell this author that the three colors of camera setup Dualshock controllers were just the three default colors they happened to have in the real-life studio recreated in that scene. It might not be true but it’d be hilarious.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sun Aug 29, 2021 10:41 am Yeah, after reading all of that stuff again, I changed my mind

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Aug 29, 2021 11:54 am It is true that Anno is sensitive to colors/color symbolism and reusing those colors specifically was probably a conscious choice, but that particular analysis seems a little overcooked. It’s not a secret code really: more “it’s like poetry, it rhymes.”

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sun Aug 29, 2021 9:27 pm Here's a good one. During the flashback of the Third Impact, the Mark.06's armour has blood orange segments and on it's shoulder pylons indicating it's in it's pseudo evolved form.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Sep 02, 2021 6:38 pm The full-body costumes of the NGE versions of Evas 01, 00 and 00-kai in the Tokusatsu studio. A poster of "My neighbor Totoro" on the library.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Sep 03, 2021 5:20 am 3.0+1.0: " Five minutes until phase 2 of N1 rocket attachment resumes ." Me: Well that's an on-the-nose-name for a rocket booster, but ok-- Little later... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by chattyfish » Tue Sep 07, 2021 6:45 pm At first I wanted to write this somewhere in "Quantum Rei" or "The Last Train Station Scene" discussion, but in the end I realized that this thread is the most suitable. The original series began with a mysterious sequence: waiting for Misato Shinji looks at a bend in the road, in the middle of which there's a Fata Morgana Rei in a school uniform looking at him. He's distracted by a flock of white birds taking off from the wires, looks back to the road, but there is no one. In the next instant a thundering wave of air from the explosion covers him. And all would probably did not care about it if the same take-off birds had not been inserted into the first meeting of Shinji and Rei in an alternate reality, where they, running to school, collided with their heads at the turn. Well, this is definitely a sign! Not clear which one, but... do not ask questions, just keep reflect. When at the end of EoE, hearing the splash and turning his head, Shinji sees her ghost hovering over red water and looking at him, at that moment the girl was confidently promoted to quantum entities. There were no birds, but this didn't bother anyone, because, you know, the question "why is he strangling Asuka in the final?" tightly blocked everything else. As we know, the series had difficulties with production at one time, the concept changed several times, just think of it as a mascot for memory. And in general, there are some problems with animals after the end of the world, obv. In my opinion, Eva has always had a bunch of purely artistic images that are not subject to analytics. It may even be just woven from them. And maybe that's why Eva was so painful, beautiful and sometimes very touching. The emphasis was clearly on aesthetic composition, not theories, hidden meanings and other such things. Therefore, intuitively, Rei's appearances were perceived (by me) as a greeting and goodbye to the young man in a completely fucking segment of his life, each time promising big changes ahead. And again, there's no one to ask, and over the past time her awaiting image has become a "basic" for the story, a mandatory checkpoint. The announcement of Rebuild to production was accompanied by cool stories, they say, "this time we will do it right", without mistakes. And it's true, for example, they removed the classic scene from the beginning where the de-energized 01 protects the boy from falling debris. (It broke the line that 01 turns the beast under the influence of boy's feelings, not his mother.) However, Rei's phantom and her dovecote were still there. She still stands on the road at the very beginning of 1.11 and looks at him. Just try not to draw it and all the seagulls near the studio will be burned by her fans. And here's the 4th film. Shinji sits on the Nerv ruins, leaving Third Village to retire at the lake. Birds plunge from electric poles, he raises his head and sees Ayanami's mirage hovering above the water and looking at him against the backdrop of a huge non-striped moon. Meanwhile he's distracted by her q-version, Shinji raises his head again, but there is none. Maybe there's nothing in it, and the creators just like this image. Maybe the birds fly away disturbed by the noise, while Shinji has progressive schizophrenia against the background of childhood trauma. Or maybe this one is Ayanami who, together with him, revises favorite filmstrips in film studios. Who knows. But then he wakes up at the station. On a nearby platform, people who look suspiciously like the grown-ups Kaworu, Rei, and possibly Asuka are waiting for their train. The camera captures Kaworu and Rei standing together. The train stops, the birds take off, and no one is left on the platform. And while the new question is "why is he with Mari?" and "Why is she with Kaworu?" again caught all the attention, personally I really like the slipping unnoticed detail -- this last time she didn't look at him.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by dzzthink » Thu Sep 09, 2021 7:21 pm When each of the main characters comes back or 'wakes up' from instrumentality they stop wearing their plug suits and return to their normal clothing and original states before impact. Asuka wakes up in that army jacket after the beach scene and her eye is back to normal, Rei II returns to her school uniform and her hair is back to being short, Shinji is back in his school uniform after his mom saves him, Mari jumps into the ocean in a plug suit but comes up in her school uniform. This also parallels the many exposition shots in the movie where you see the plugs suits being hung up to dry, almost foreshadowing the end of Eva.

[]: Re: Small details you noticed in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Sep 09, 2021 7:56 pm dzzthink wrote: Mari jumps into the ocean in a plug suit but comes up in her school uniform.
